tagline: Who among you is the traitor?
night_description: The suspects are making their moves.
day_description: Talk it out. Who do you suspect?
discuss_desc: Talk with other players. Who is suspicious?
watch: Watch the rest of the game in silence.
no_one_died: No one was killed last night.
role_civilian: You are an ordinary town member. Use your vote wisely.
role_doctor: Each night, choose a player to heal. They will survive if attacked.
role_detective: Each night, investigate a player to learn if they are suspicious.
role_escort: Each night, block a player's night action.
role_vigilante: You can shoot a player at night. Use your power carefully.
role_mayor: Reveal yourself to gain 3 votes, but you can no longer be healed.
role_spy: You can see the mafia's night chat.
role_mafioso: Each night, vote with your team to eliminate a player.
role_godfather: Lead the mafia. You appear innocent to investigations.
role_consort: Block a player's night action on behalf of the mafia.
role_janitor: Clean the crime scene — the victim's role stays hidden.
role_jester: Win by getting the town to vote you out during the day.
role_serial_killer: Kill a player each night. You are immune to the mafia.
role_survivor: Stay alive until the end to win. You have limited vests.
role_executioner: Get your target lynched by the town to win.
role_witch: Redirect a player's action to a different target.
